Activity Name: Bemedj to walker via Cass lake
Comment: Ran out of water 5 miles in due to eating hot dog and medium sized oreo blizzard at dq. Dumb move. They dehydrated me, and I hadn't consumed enough water on route up. I brought only 1 water bottle because of bike lock taking 2nd bottle position. I should consume 1 bottle per hour, and an energy bar + gel every other hour. Also, save the route to strava using desktop/laptop before heading out. Relying on Google maps bike mode is terrible, since it takes you on dirt paths.
